options.text: So, open the front, pull the paper, and turn off the machine.
So, back panel, pull slowly, then reset—got it!
I'll just force it out and press the power button.
Do I need to unplug it before doing anything?

content.explanation: 正确答案复述了原指令的关键动作：back panel（后盖）、pull slowly（慢点拉）、reset（重置），符合‘确认步骤’场景中复述以确保理解的要求。干扰项1混淆了前后部操作，干扰项3使用了危险动作（force it out），干扰项4是提问而非确认，不符合复述确认的指令。
content.speakerText: Just pull the paper out gently from the back, then hit reset.
content.speakerTextCn: 从后面轻轻把纸拉出来，再按重置键。

options.text: So, unplug it, take off the cover, and clean the filter—got it!
I think I should clean it first, then unplug.
Can I use a vacuum to clean the filter?

content.explanation: 正确答案准确复述了步骤顺序和关键动词（unplug, take off, clean），符合确认步骤的核心要求。干扰项1顺序错误，干扰项3是额外提问而非确认，干扰项4是拖延回应，未体现理解确认。
content.speakerText: First, disconnect the power cable. Then, remove the cover and clean the filter.
content.speakerTextCn: 首先，断开电源线。然后，取下盖子并清洁滤网。
